texto: And it's stupid to have rules about how long you're allowed to cry and when you're supposed to flip a switch and stop crying. You can't even think. All you can do is feel. So how the heck are you supposed to follow rules?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Lynn Plourde que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “And it's stupid to have rules about how long you're allowed to cry and when you're supposed to fl…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, grief, rules, com foco em luto e reflexao.
